Part.Source:
//RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, 1, domConfSistema.TCon147_ExcluirIcmsPisCofins, &TCon147_ExcluirIcmsPisCofins) //RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, 1, domConfSistema.TCon145_IpiBaseCalculoICMS, &TCon145_IpiBaseCalculoICMS)
//LOCALIZAR CLIENTES PARA EMITIR, ANTES DO VENCIMENTO. For Each Order EmpCod, PadGrupCod, padGrupItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PadGrupIsSel = true Where PadGrupNfeNfs.IsEmpty() or PadGrupNfeNfs.IsNull() or PadGrupNfeNfs = '55'
do 'limpaVariaveis' &FilCod = PadGrupFilCod
//ACHAMOS o CLIENTE, AGORA LOCALIZAR A DUPLICATA PrcEmitirNotaDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, PadGrupTip, PadGrupPesCod, PadGrupDia, &CreCod, &NotaValorMoeda)
If &CreCod > 0 and &NotaValorMoeda > 0//TEM NOTA PARA EMITIR do 'GetDuplicata'
&FilBasImp = RetornaFilialBaseImposto.Udp(EmpCod, &FilCod) RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(EmpCod, &FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &TbImpUfeCod) &CImpOriUfeCod = &TbImpUfeCod if not PadGrupNfePesCod.IsEmpty() and not PadGrupNfePesCod.IsNull() &PadGrupPesCod = PadGrupNfePesCod Else &PadGrupPesCod = PadGrupPesCod EndIf do 'getCliente'
if PadGrupLctCod.IsEmpty() or PadGrupLctCod.IsNull() &LctCod = 2 //PARAMETRIZAR Else &LctCod = PadGrupLctCod Endif
do 'GetTipoLancamento' //GRAVA CAPA NOTA
if &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty() and not &CreDupNro.IsEmpty() &NfeDadAdi = 'PAGAMENTO DA NOTA FISCAL REALIZADA ATRAVES DA DUPLICATA N. ' + trim(&CreDupNro) EndIf
GravaNotaFiscalModelo55_Capa.Call(EmpCod, &FilCod, Serverdate(), Serverdate(), serverTime(), &NfeNum, &NfeSer, NotaFinalidade.EmissaoNormal, &LctCod, &NfeCliEml, &PadGrupPesCod, &NfeCliRaz, &NfeCliTipPes, &NfeCliCpf, &NfeCliCnpj,&NfeCliFon, &AuxNfeCliIns, &NfeCliSuf, &NfeCliEnd, &NfeCliEndNro, &NfeCliBai, &NfeCliCep, &NfeCliCidCod, &NfeCliCpl, &NfeDadAdi, &NfeCod, &NfeTraPlaCod,&NfeTraPlaUF,&NfeTraRntc,&NfeMotNom,&NfeTraCod,&NfeTraRaz,&NfeTraTipPes,&NfeTraEnd,&NfeTraEndNro,&NfeTraBai,&NfeTraEml,&NfeTraCidCod,&NfeTraCnpj,&NfeTraInsEst,&NfeTraCpf,&NfeTraCep,TipoFrete.SemFrete,&NfePesLiq,&NfePesBrt,&NfeQtdVol,&NfeEspVol,&NfeMarVol,&NfeNroVol, '', Nota_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA, &NfeCidExp, '55', &NfeChv, &NfeDtaFat,'1', '', false, '', '')
//GRAVA ITENS &NfeProCod = PadGrupProCod &NfeProGraCod = PadGrupProGraCod do 'getProduto' &NfeProDadAdi = PadGrupCpl &MesAno = padL(trim(str(month(&NfeDupVct))), 2, '0') + '/' + trim(str(Year(&NfeDupVct))) &NfeProDadAdi = &NfeProDadAdi.Replace('[MM/AAAA]', &MesAno) if not PadGrupNfePesCpl.IsEmpty() and not PadGrupNfePesCpl.IsNull() &NfeProDadAdi += ' ' + PadGrupNfePesCpl.Trim() Endif &NfeProDadAdi = &NfeProDadAdi.Trim()
//CalculaICMSeOutros.Call(&ImpExcPisCofins, &ImpIncIpi, &FilRegTrib, &NfeSitCod, &NfeProTaxIcms, &NfeProTaxRedIcms, &NfeProTaxIcmsSt, &NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt, &ImpAlqMVA, &NfeProTaxIpi, &NfeProTaxCofins, &NfeProTaxPIS, &NfeProTaxDif, &NfeProPISRed, &NfeProCofinsRed, &NfeProBasIcms, &NfeProVlrIcms, &NfeProBasIcmsSt, &NfeProVlrImcsSt, &NfeProBasIpi, &NfeProVlrIpi, &NfeProBasPIS, &NfeproVlrCofins, &NfeProBasCOFINS, &NfeProVlrPIS, &NfeProVlrDif) &sdtImpostoProduto = new() &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm = &NfeProBasIcms &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcmSt = &NfeProBasIcmsSt &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIpi = &NfeProBasIpi &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasPis = &NfeProBasPIS &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasCofins = &NfeProBasCOFINS &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorTotalProduto = &NfeProBasIcms // TOTAL PRODUTO
CalculaImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtImpostoProduto) //Calcula impostos //GravaNotaFiscalModelo65_Item.Call(EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0, &NfeProCod, &NfeProGraCod, &AuxNfeProNom, 1, &NotaValorMoeda, &NotaValorMoeda, &NfeEmbUnd,&NfeEmbUndTrib, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpCstCod, &ProOriTriCod, &NfeNcmCod, &NfeNcmCest, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod, &NfeProDadAdi, &NfeProBasIcms, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpAlqIcmInt,&sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcm, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpRedAlqIcmInt, &NfeProBasIcmsSt, &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcmSt,&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpAlqIcmExt,&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpredAlqIcmExt,&NfeProBasIpi, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpi, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpALqIcmUFDest, &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIpi, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstIpi, &sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCstCofins, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpCofins, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstPisCofins, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CimpPis, &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrDif, &NfeProII_Bas,&NfeProII_DspAdu,&NfeProII_IOF,&NfeProII_vlr,&NfeProCodAnp,&NfeProDscAnp,&NfeProPerGlp, &NfeProPerGni, &NfeProPerGnn, &NfeProVlrPar, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPisRed, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofinsRed, &NfeProLvrPis, &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrCofins, Status_SimNao.Nao, 0, 0,0, '', '', 0, &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CIMpIpiEnq,Status_simNao.Nao) GravaNotaFiscalModelo65_ItemCBSIBS(EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0, &NfeProCod, &NfeProGraCod, &AuxNfeProNom, 1, &NotaValorMoeda, &NotaValorMoeda, &NfeEmbUnd,&NfeEmbUndTrib, &ProOriTriCod, &NfeNcmCod, &NfeNcmCest, &NfeProDadAdi, &NfeProII_Bas,&NfeProII_DspAdu,&NfeProII_IOF,&NfeProII_vlr,&NfeProCodAnp,&NfeProDscAnp,&NfeProPerGlp, &NfeProPerGni, &NfeProPerGnn, &NfeProVlrPar, Status_SimNao.Nao, 0, 0,0, '', '', 0, Status_simNao.Nao, &sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtImpostoProduto)
//GRAVA DUPLICATA GravaDuplicatasNFe_Automatica.Call(EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 1, &CreCod, &FilCod, 1, &NotaValorMoeda, &NfeDupVct, &CreCbrCod, &CreDupNro) //DUPLICATA
//GRAVATOTAIS AtualizaTotaisNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0) ObsAutomaticaNFe.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod)
//GRAVA SOLICITACAO GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 'S', 1, 'E', &SolCod)
Endif EndFor
Sub 'limpaVariaveis' &NfeCod = 0 &CreCod = 0 &CreVlrSdo = 0 &CreDupNro = '' &NfeDadAdi = '' EndSub
sub 'GetDuplicata' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CreCod = &CreCod &CreDupNro = CreDupNro &NfeDupVct = CreDtaVct &CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo
Exit EndFor
EndSub
sub 'GetTipoLancamento' For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctCod = &LctCod &LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getProduto' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &NfeProCod Where ProGraCod = &NfeProGraCod
&AuxNfeProNom ='' if ProNomNF.IsEmpty() or ProNomNF.IsNull() &AuxNfeProNom = ProNomGra Else &AuxNfeProNom = ProNomNF IF ProGraCod > 1 &AuxNfeProNom += ' | ' +trim(ProGraNom) Endif Endif
&NfeEmbUnd = ProEmbUnd &NfeProDadAdi = ProDetNfe
If not ProUndTrib.IsEmpty() and not ProUndTrib.IsNull() &NfeEmbUndTrib = ProUndTrib Else &NfeEmbUndTrib = ProEmbUndTrib Endif
&NfeNcmCod = NcmCod &NfeNcmCest = trim(Str(ProNcmCest)) &ProCatCod = ProCatCod &ProOriTriCod = ProOriTriCod
Exit EndFor
&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &FilBasImp &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &LctBasImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &PedCliCidUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &PedCliGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &ProCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.ProCod = &NfeProCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() prcRetornaConfiguracaoImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs) EndSub
sub 'GetCliente' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PadGrupPesCod
&NfeCliEnd = PesEntLog &NfeCliEndNro = PesEntNro &NfeCliBai = PesEntBai &NfeCliCep = PesEntCep &NfeCliCpl = PesEntCpl &NfeCliCidCod = PesEntCidCod &NfeCliCidUF = PesEntUfeCod &NfeCliCnpj = PesCnpj
If PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA &AuxNfeCliIns = PesInsEst Else &AuxNfeCliIns = PesCadPro EndIF
&NfeCliSuf = PesSuf
&NfeCliEntCEP = PesEntCep &NfeCliEntBai = PesEntBai
&NfeCliEntCidCod = PesEntCidCod &NfeCliEntCmp = PesEntCpl &NfeCliEntLog = PesEntLog &NfeCliEntLogNro = PesEntNro
&PedCliCidUfeCod = PesEntUfeCod &PedCliGruImpCod = PesGruImpCod
if PesRazNf.IsEmpty() or PesRazNf.IsNull() &NfeCliRaz = PesRaz Else &NfeCliRaz = PesRazNf Endif
&NfeCliFon = PesPrmFon &NfeCliTipPes = PesTip &NfeCliCpf = PesCpf
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesEmlCod Where PesEmlFat = true &NfeCliEml = PesEml Exit When none &NfeCliEml = '' EndFor
Exit EndFor EndSub
